text:
miwi        2007-12-18 18:37:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ftp/junglemonkey     Makefile 
  Added files:
    ftp/junglemonkey/files patch-src-util_sha_cache.c 
  Log:
  - Fixes a linker problem when not using libtool 15
  - Fixes a bug causing the program to crash on exit
    if the hostname was not set yet
  
  PR:             118797
  Submitted by:   Pietro Cerutti <gahr@gahr.ch>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
